certificates.title: Certificates & Standards
certificates.subtitle: Our products meet international quality and safety standards
certificates.heroSubtitle: Our manufacturing processes comply with international standards and are audited by independent certification bodies.
certificates.trustText: All of our products are manufactured to international standards and regularly tested in independent laboratories. We are committed to delivering the highest quality to our customers at all times.

aboutSection.title: About Us
aboutSection.text1: At Soft & Power, we offer quality, reliable and competitive solutions in the field of hygiene and personal care products. We operate in international markets with our wide product range in baby diapers, adult diapers, wet wipes and hygiene product categories. We produce our products in accordance with high quality standards, continuously improving them by prioritizing user comfort.
aboutSection.text2: Thanks to our strong supply infrastructure and flexible production solutions, we provide fast, sustainable and cost-effective products to our business partners. With our export-oriented approach, we aim to be a reliable business partner in different countries and continue to grow on a global scale in the hygiene sector.

video.title: Discover Our
video.subtitle: We produce world-class hygiene products with our modern facilities and advanced technology infrastructure.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Contact us for wholesale orders, private label or general information

footer.description: Soft & Power Hygiene is a Turkey-based hygiene products manufacturer. Your reliable supplier exporting to 50+ countries.

productsListPage.heroSubtitle: From baby diapers to adult hygiene products, wet wipes to surface cleaning towels — we manufacture an extensive product range to international quality standards.
productsListPage.categoriesSubtitle: Pick the category that suits you and explore our products.
productsListPage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for detailed information about our products or to request a wholesale quote.

about.heroSubtitle: Quality hygiene and personal care, built on trust and sustainable growth.
about.missionText1: We aim to enhance quality of life by developing reliable, high-quality, and accessible hygiene and care products that meet the daily needs of people of all ages. Our broad product portfolio—including baby diapers, adult diapers, pant diapers, sanitary and urological pads, underpads, wet wipes, and other personal care products—is developed in accordance with international quality and safety standards and supported by modern production technologies.
about.missionText2: Across all our operations, we adopt a people-centered approach and regard quality, reliability, and sustainability as core values. Our objective goes beyond manufacturing; we focus on delivering solutions that provide long-term value for our users and business partners while bringing comfort, confidence, and reliability into everyday life. Our growth is built on continuous improvement, attention to detail, and trust-based business relationships.
about.visionText1: We aim to become a trusted and preferred brand in the hygiene and personal care industry, achieving sustainable growth across international markets through a strong commitment to quality and reliability. By integrating technology, innovation, and operational excellence, we deliver solutions that adapt to evolving market dynamics and user expectations.
about.visionText2: Guided by ethical principles and a strong sense of environmental and social responsibility, we focus on building a respected corporate structure that creates long-term value for our employees, business partners, and all stakeholders.

catalogWidget.title: Online
catalogWidget.subtitle: Unlimited access to all our products in a single catalogue.

productionPage.heroSubtitle: Our state-of-the-art production lines and rigorous quality control deliver manufacturing at the highest standards.
productionPage.step1Desc: The highest-quality raw materials are sourced from certified suppliers and pass incoming quality control.
productionPage.step2Desc: Manufacturing is carried out on fully automated lines with high speed and precision.
productionPage.step3Desc: Every production batch is subjected to laboratory tests and multi-stage quality control.
productionPage.step4Desc: Automated packaging and labelling are performed under hygienic conditions.
productionPage.step5Desc: Products are stored in safe conditions and shipped on time.
productionPage.qc1Desc: All incoming raw materials are tested in our laboratory.
productionPage.qc2Desc: In-line quality control is performed continuously during production.
productionPage.qc3Desc: Finished products undergo absorbency, durability and hygiene tests.
productionPage.qc4Desc: A visual and physical final check is performed before packaging.

exportPage.heroSubtitle: We export hygiene products from Turkey to the world. Together with our trusted partners in 20+ countries, we deliver our quality and competitive products to global markets.
exportPage.formSubtitle: Fill out the form for export and wholesale order requests. Our experts will contact you shortly.
exportPage.phMessage: Describe your product needs and order details...
exportPage.submitSuccess: Your request has been received. We will contact you shortly.

privateLabelPage.heroSubtitle: Baby diapers, adult diapers, wet wipes and more — let us manufacture your branded products.
privateLabelPage.adv1Desc: Get started with low minimum order quantities.
privateLabelPage.adv2Desc: Our professional team is at your service for packaging and label design.
privateLabelPage.adv3Desc: ISO 9001, ISO 13485 and CE certified production.
privateLabelPage.adv4Desc: Sample production in 7 days, mass production in 30–45 days.
privateLabelPage.step1Desc: You share product specifications, packaging and target market information.
privateLabelPage.step2Desc: Samples tailored to your requirements are prepared for your approval.
privateLabelPage.step3Desc: Packaging design is finalised and a printing proof is sent for your approval.
privateLabelPage.step4Desc: Mass production begins and goods are shipped on the agreed date.
privateLabelPage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for detailed information and a quote. Our team will respond as soon as possible.
